title: Lorebook Entry
description: A single entry within a Character Card V4 lorebook, containing content triggered by keyword matching.

id.title: Entry ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this lorebook entry.

name.title: Entry Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this lorebook entry.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Author comment or note about this entry.

content.title: Content
content.description: The text content that is injected into the prompt when this entry is triggered.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this entry is active and can be triggered.

keys.title: Keys
keys.description: Primary keywords that trigger this entry when found in the context.

secondary_keys.title: Secondary Keys
secondary_keys.description: Secondary keywords used for selective activation. When selective mode is enabled, at least one secondary key must also match.

selective.title: Selective
selective.description: When true, both a primary key and a secondary key must match to trigger this entry.

use_regex.title: Use Regex
use_regex.description: When true, keys are interpreted as regular expressions.

case_sensitive.title: Case Sensitive
case_sensitive.description: When true, key matching is case-sensitive.

constant.title: Constant
constant.description: When true, this entry is always injected regardless of key matching.

exclude_keys.title: Exclude Keys
exclude_keys.description: Keywords that prevent this entry from being triggered when found in the context.

insertion_order.title: Insertion Order
insertion_order.description: Numeric order controlling the sequence in which triggered entries are inserted into the prompt.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Priority value for token budget allocation. Higher priority entries are kept when the token budget is exceeded.

placement_fallbacks.title: Placement Fallbacks
placement_fallbacks.description: Ordered list of fallback placements to try if the primary placement cannot be satisfied.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Controls runtime behavior of this entry.

ignore_on_max_context.title: Ignore on Max Context
ignore_on_max_context.description: When true, this entry is dropped if the context is at maximum capacity.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Implementation-specific extended data for this lorebook entry.

placement.title: Placement
placement.description: Controls where in the prompt this entry's content is inserted.

target.title: Target
target.description: The target location in the prompt where this entry is inserted.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: Number of messages from the bottom of the chat history to insert at.

reverse_depth.title: Reverse Depth
reverse_depth.description: Number of messages from the top of the chat history to insert at.

role.title: Role
role.description: The message role under which this entry is inserted.

scan_depth_override.title: Scan Depth Override
scan_depth_override.description: Overrides the lorebook's scan_depth for this entry.

instruct_scan_depth_override.title: Instruct Scan Depth Override
instruct_scan_depth_override.description: Overrides the lorebook's scan_depth for this entry in instruct mode.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: Additional conditions that must be met for this entry to activate.

min_turn.title: Minimum Turn
min_turn.description: Minimum conversation turn number before this entry can activate.

every_n_turns.title: Every N Turns
every_n_turns.description: Activates this entry every N turns.

greeting_index.title: Greeting Index
greeting_index.description: Only activate when the specified greeting index is in use.

user_icon_name.title: User Icon Name
user_icon_name.description: Only activate when the user's icon matches this name.

force_activate.title: Force Activate
force_activate.description: When true, this entry is always activated regardless of other conditions.

force_deactivate.title: Force Deactivate
force_deactivate.description: When true, this entry is always deactivated regardless of other conditions.

on_first_match.title: On First Match
on_first_match.description: Behavior after the first time this entry is matched.

disable_ui_prompts.title: Disable UI Prompts
disable_ui_prompts.description: List of UI prompt identifiers to disable when this entry is active.

variable_condition.title: Variable Condition
variable_condition.description: Expression referencing card variables that must evaluate to true for activation.

group_only.title: Group Only
group_only.description: When true, this entry only activates in group chat contexts.

solo_only.title: Solo Only
solo_only.description: When true, this entry only activates in solo (non-group) chat contexts.

min_context_tokens.title: Minimum Context Tokens
min_context_tokens.description: Minimum number of available context tokens required for this entry to activate.
